title: galium luteum var. brachycarpum
intro: Galium luteum var. brachycarpum, also known as the lesser wood-rue or yellow bedstraw, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Galium luteum var. brachycarpum are thought to include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to relax smooth muscle tissue and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Galium luteum var. brachycarpum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate various health concerns.
